conversation_id.description: The unique identifier of the conversation.

hidden.description: Whether the attachment should be hidden from the user.

id.description: Optional custom ID for the attachment.

origin.description: Origin string (for example, saved object ID) for by-reference attachments. When provided without data, the content is resolved once at creation time.

type.description: The type of the attachment (e.g., text, esql, visualization).
